title: ChangeValue
description: Change in value identified for a type between two different time periods.

changeType.description: The value for which the change is computed.

previousDate.description: Previous Date (The earlier duration being considered for change  calculation)

previousAmount.description: The amount as of the earlier duration considered for change  calculation.

currentDate.description: current Date (The latest duration being considered for change  calculation)

currentAmount.description: The amount as of the latest duration considered for change  calculation.

changeAmount.description: Amount change calculated as currentAmount - previousAmount.
